nasb.text: Like vinegar to the teeth and smoke to the eyes, So is the lazy one to those who send him.

esv.text: Like vinegar to the teeth and smoke to the eyes, so is the sluggard to those who send him.

cnv.text: 醋怎樣使牙酸倒，煙怎樣薰目， 懶惰人也怎樣使差他的人難受。

ccb.text: 雇用懒惰人， 如醋倒牙，如烟熏目。

csbs.text: 醋对牙怎样、烟对眼怎样， 懒惰人对派遣他的人也怎样。
